passives.name: Thorns
passives.effects: When struck by a basic attack [[on-hit]], deal {{as|10 magic damage}} to the attacker and, if they are a champion, inflict them with {{tip|Grievous Wounds}} for 3 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: When struck by a basic attack on-hit, deal 10 magic damage to the attacker.
If the attacker is a champion, apply Grievous Wounds for 3 seconds.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution-semantics review: Thorns triggers on landed enemy basic attacks only, and does not trigger on dodged, blocked, or blinded misses.
Player-visible behavior: Bramble Vest immediately reflects 10 magic damage, and champion attackers additionally receive 3-second Grievous Wounds.
Thorns reflection is modeled as proc damage that is not blocked by spell shield and does not trigger downstream spell-effect chains.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.used_for: page-level verification of Thorns trigger conditions, Grievous Wounds champion-only gating, and interaction notes for dodge/block/blind and spell-shield behavior
